memory.instructions: Use this for cross-session notes Claude wants to remember about this user/project. Storage is per-vault (the plugin sets MEMORY_FILE_PATH to vault/.oas/memory.json). See workspace/CLAUDE.md "Memory — MCP knowledge graph" for entity-type and observation conventions.

obsidian.instructions: Obsidian vault tools: search notes, read content and frontmatter, query tags/links/backlinks, find orphaned notes, create and modify notes, manage vault structure. Use when interacting with the user's knowledge base or Obsidian vault.
